title: [Skyship, The Corridor]
description: The shelves in this section have been thoroughly raided, pages from books torn and scattered with tattered parchments strewn across the floor, as if multiple individuals had haphazardly looted their contents.  The glaes-covered viewing cavity set into the floor continues through this section, only several sections are absent the withered figures from elsewhere in the area.  Thin, diagonal cracks frame its edges, but its structure appears largely intact.
